lever_summary: For large dense F64 contiguous forward cumulative scans, route through the existing direct-output scan builder even when there is only one scan line. This avoids cloning the full input and then overwriting it in place while keeping the same single accumulator and ascending element order.

alien_graveyard.primitive: data-movement elimination for sequential prefix primitives
alien_graveyard.mapping: The arithmetic dependency remains sequential, so the safe lever is to remove the redundant full-buffer clone/write pass and preserve the exact prefix fold.

baseline.command: RCH_REQUIRE_REMOTE=1 rch exec -- cargo bench -p fj-lax --bench lax_baseline 'eval/(add_64k_f64_vec|add_64k_f64_dense_ref|add_broadcast_row_1024x1024_f64|add_broadcast_col_1024x1024_f64|select_1024x1024_f64|lt_same_shape_1024x1024_f64|reduce_sum_4096x1024_axis1_f64|reduce_sum_4096x1024_axis0_f64|cumsum_4m_f64_1d|gather_256x256_f64_vec|scatter_256x256_f64_vec|one_hot_2048x512_f64)' -- --warm-up-time 1 --measurement-time 3 --sample-size 10 --noplot

candidate.source: clean detached worktree with only crates/fj-lax/src/reduction.rs direct-output hunk
candidate.command: RCH_REQUIRE_REMOTE=1 RCH_WORKER=vmi1152480 RCH_WORKERS=vmi1152480 rch exec -- cargo bench -p fj-lax --bench lax_baseline 'eval/cumsum_4m_f64_1d' -- --warm-up-time 1 --measurement-time 3 --sample-size 10 --noplot

change.lever: Change the dense F64 axis_stride == 1 branch to use scan_contiguous_lines_to_vec for large forward scans even when outer_count == 1; reverse one-line and small scans keep clone+in-place.

isomorphism.ordering: unchanged: forward contiguous scans still use one acc initialized to float_init and visit each line in source order, i=0..axis_dim, storing the prefix for each element immediately after the same float_op call.
isomorphism.floating_point: unchanged: no reassociation, no parallel prefix for the one-line target, no FMA request, no widened or rounded intermediate beyond the existing f64 accumulator.
isomorphism.errors: axis validation, shape/stride overflow checks, dtype fallback, reverse one-line behavior, small-scan behavior, and strided-axis behavior are unchanged.

validation.name: focused_cumulative_tests
validation.command: RCH_REQUIRE_REMOTE=1 RCH_WORKER=vmi1152480 RCH_WORKERS=vmi1152480 rch exec -- cargo test -p fj-lax cumulative -- --nocapture
validation.result: passed on vmi1152480: 4 passed; 0 failed; includes dense_cumulative_bit_identical_to_literal_path and threaded_cumulative_matches_serial_reference

validation.name: crate_check
validation.command: RCH_REQUIRE_REMOTE=1 rch exec -- cargo check -p fj-lax --all-targets

validation.name: crate_clippy
validation.command: RCH_REQUIRE_REMOTE=1 rch exec -- cargo clippy -p fj-lax --all-targets -- -D warnings

validation.name: fmt_and_whitespace
validation.command: cargo fmt --check --package fj-lax && git diff --check -- crates/fj-lax/src/reduction.rs .skill-loop-progress.md .beads/issues.jsonl

validation.name: ubs_changed_files
validation.result: exited nonzero from pre-existing broad file inventory in reduction.rs; embedded fmt, clippy, check, and test-build sections were clean
